functional.description: Integrate the Synkra AIOX Dashboard repository into the project (submodule/monorepo/standalone).
Configure environment variables for dev, staging, and production.
functional.rationale: Required for external service connections (API, Supabase, etc).

functional.description: Setup build pipeline to compile dashboard locally.
Provide access to the dashboard at http://localhost:3000/dashboard in dev.
Manage dependencies to avoid version conflicts.

nonFunctional.description: Dashboard build time should be under 30 seconds.
Dashboard must be accessible and error-free on startup.

constraints.impact: Requires github access and submodule management.

constraints.description: Integration strategy must be documented (Submodule recommended).

assumptions.description: The dashboard repository is public or access is already granted.

interactions.description: Clone project -> Install deps -> Setup .env -> Run 'npm run dev' -> Access dashboard.

terminology.definition: The official Synkra monitoring UI for the AIOX core system.
